summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rack&Roll Cafe after 6 requested changes. All major features working correctly including trash talk removal, INR pricing, multi-activity booking, calendar picker, updated contact info, and AI planner functionality.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 status instead of 201 for successful booking creation

passed_tests: Trash talk generator completely removed from UI and backend (404 response)
Menu prices display in INR (₹) format - verified ₹249, ₹199, ₹299 etc
Booking calendar date picker working with month navigation
Multi-activity selection with +/- quantity controls for Snooker, Pool, PS5
Booking form submission with multiple activities successful
Phone number 9260940347 correctly displayed in footer
AI Visit Planner generating responses (trash talk removed, planner remains)
Booking availability endpoint returning proper slot data
Time slots showing availability and allowing selection
Complete booking flow from activity selection to confirmation
Booking success page with confirmation details
Activity summary displaying selected items with quantities

success_percentage.backend: 89% (8/9 tests passed - minor status code issue)
